name: Trek 2000 International Ltd
summary: Trek 2000 International Ltd, an investment holding company, engages in the research, design, development, and dealing of computer hardware, software, electronic components, and other related products. The company operates through Interactive Customised Solutions, Interactive Consumer Solutions, and Licensing segments. It offers patented technology solutions, including USB, wireless, anti-piracy, compression, security/encryption, centralized management system, and PC and mobile apps products; and portable storage solutions, such as flash memory. The company also provides wireless solutions, including patient alert systems, Flucard, Flucard ultra, Ai-ball, smart gateway, and smart sensor for diapers; and ThumbDrive solutions, such as trek's smart meters, micro solid state devices, i solid state devices, ThumbDrive cloud, thumbdrive crypto, thumbdrive swipe, ThumbDrive SWAN, and chez solutions to protect crucial information, as well as secure transaction, identity, key, encryption, and storage flash drives. In addition, it is involved in the research and experimental development on medical technologies; research, design, development, and distribution of memory modules, and other related products and solutions; and development and marketing of Web portal services, including social networking sites. Further, the company provides design solutions, such as complete design-in modules or sub-modules in semi-customized or customized forms for software, hardware, and firmware; and security solutions for mobile storage devices, as well as licenses its patented technologies and trademarks. It operates in China/Hong Kong, Taiwan, India, Singapore, Indonesia, Malaysia, Thailand, Europe, the United States, and internationally. Trek 2000 International Ltd was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Singapore.
